title: BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky
posterAlt: BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky (2020) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Record-shattering Korean girl band BLACKPINK tell their story —  and detail the hard fought journey of the dreams and trials behind their meteoric rise.
synopsis: Released in 2020, BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky is a documentary and music film from United States and South Korea. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
